The RAA211450 is a DC/DC synchronous step-down (Buck) regulator that supports a 4.5V to 42V input voltage range and adjustable output voltage. It can deliver up to continuous 5A of continuous output current with premium load and line regulation performance.The RAA211450 uses peak-current mode control architecture.
